practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the reversal roles
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it names the right linked-list pointer jobs during reversal.
hints: Save nextNode before flipping an arrow.
The pointer that ends as the new head is prev.
At the beginning of reversal, prev starts as null.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You matched the reversal pointer roles correctly.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck which pointer protects the rest of the list and which one becomes the new head.

blanks.label: Pointer that saves the forward path
Pointer that becomes the new head
Starting value for the backward pointer

visibleTests.label: Save the rest
visibleTests.scenario: Which pointer protects the forward chain?

visibleTests.label: New head
visibleTests.scenario: Which pointer is returned at the end?

visibleTests.label: Starting backward pointer
visibleTests.scenario: What value does prev start with?
